title: Selling Canva Templates Without a Gumroad Account: Which Option Works Regardless of Where You Are
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great product like a Canva template and being unable to collect payment is frustrating, especially when platforms like Gumroad are not available due to geographic restrictions, leaving many creators in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya without a clear way to sell their digital products and get paid, which is why finding a reliable alternative to traditional platforms is crucial for these creators to reach their customers and receive payments seamlessly
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing payment platforms, it's essential to consider the underlying infrastructure and how it affects creators in restricted countries, as traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe have compliance layers that exclude many countries, resulting in a significant portion of the global creator community being left out, which is why crypto-native infrastructure is becoming an attractive alternative for those looking to bypass these restrictions
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip often rely on PayPal or Stripe for payment processing, which means that creators in countries where these services are not available are unable to use them, and even when alternatives are available, they often come with high fees, poor exchange rates, and limited functionality, making it difficult for creators to operate efficiently and effectively
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

The buyer experience in a crypto store is simpler than most creators expect when they first hear about it. The buyer selects a coin — USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, TRX — and receives a QR code and wallet address generated specifically for their order. They send the payment from their wallet. The transaction confirms on chain, typically within minutes for USDT on Tron or SOL. The store detects the confirmation automatically through the NOWPayments webhook and delivers the digital product to the buyer's email. The buyer does not need an account on your store. They do not need to provide identity verification. They need a crypto wallet and the product you made. The experience from purchase to delivery takes under ten minutes for most transactions and requires no manual step from the creator at any point.

The traditional platform model is broken for creators in restricted countries, and it's time to consider alternative solutions that can provide a more secure, flexible, and cost-effective way to sell digital products
The Real Cost Difference

While traditional platforms may seem convenient, they often come with hidden costs, such as high transaction fees, currency conversion fees, and payout delays, which can eat into a creator's profit margins, whereas crypto-native infrastructure offers a more transparent and cost-effective solution, with lower fees and instant payouts, making it a more attractive option for creators who want to maximize their earnings
Which One to Use and Why

For creators who want to sell their digital products without the hassle of traditional platforms, crypto-native infrastructure is the way to go, as it offers a more flexible, secure, and cost-effective solution, and with the help of platforms like Unchained Commerce, creators can now easily set up their own digital stores and start selling their products to a global audience, without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

Creators in restricted countries can now sell their digital products without a Gumroad account by using crypto-native infrastructure, which allows them to receive payments from anywhere in the world, and with the help of platforms like Unchained Commerce, they can easily set up their own digital stores and start selling their products to a global audience, getting paid instantly and securely, regardless of their location, and without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account, making it a game-changer for those who have been excluded from traditional platforms
Crypto payment infrastructure is the key to unlocking a global market for creators, and it's essential to understand how it works and how it can benefit their business
